name: Gift Container Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. In addition to fabric hats and other decorations, you can paint the outside of the jar.
2. Sketch a simple design on paper, then fit it around the jar until you are pleased with the arrangement.
3. Tape the design, pattern-side out, to the inside of the jar.
4. Paint the outside of the jar following the pattern using oil paints.
5. Allow the paint to dry completely.
6. Remove the taped pattern from the inside of the jar.
7. Bake the jars for 1 hour at 200 degrees in an oven to set the paint.
8. Turn off the oven, but leave the jars inside for a couple of hours to finish setting the paint.
9. Fill the jars with food.
10. Decorate the lid as desired (e.g., fabric hats, doilies with ribbons blending colors from the paint, etc.).
